kind: BOOTSTRAP — single 4-slot capture (NOT the prescribed B1 36h/24-cycle replay corpus)

b1_acceptance.note: Daily rollup with 4 snapshot slots, not 24 hourly cycles. Supports non-temporal tasks (same-event pairs, angle, cluster membership). Persistence/momentum/F5-2 temporal strata are UNCOVERABLE here and require the B1 36h capture.
